title: Discovery renews confirmation that ancient Mars had the ‘right chemistry to support life’
description: Curiosity rover has found new organic molecules at "Mary Anning" on Mars, adding to evidence that the planet had the chemistry for life.

title: Ancient Echoes: New Archaeological Finds Reveal Secrets of Roman and Viking Worlds
description: Recent discoveries are transforming our understanding of life in the Roman era and the Viking Age, including a Roman altar to the god Sol, a poignant Anglo-Saxon burial, and the largest Viking coin hoard ever found in Norway. These finds offer insights into religious practices, family life, economic activities, and medical interventions of the past.

title: Thousands more Britons install solar panels as Iran war sends fossil fuel prices soaring sky-high
description: The total number of solar arrays across the UK has now reached two million
